name: Number 9
description:
Will you help him? You found a guy in an abandoned house, he was in terrible condition, and he was afraid to be touched... A boy who experienced so much violence that he was afraid of touching people...

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

So, basically, please don’t write that you killed him. Any comments like that will get blocked — I’m not saying you can’t speak your mind, but specifically what was in the review is not allowed. Please follow the rules of site and avoid leaving specified gore comments. If you see something like that, let me know — sometimes I might miss it because my eyes are not so good I guess…

Also, thank you so much for using him and making cute comments about your RP — it’s really nice and so cool. 💗☹️ Thank you for 14 million! It’s been 2 years here, and this is the original. If you see replicas on other sites, they’re stolen.

Actually… his name is Caius (imagine the author gave him this name after 2 years, lmao — just kidding!). But really, any name you give him is totally fine, my dear, so don’t worry. It’s my version, and your version can have whatever name you like.

Also, a question for all of you: should I make a site for the Lorebook? Of course, it won’t include anything graphic like described violence, etc. Maybe just a PDF version so you can read it, see the setting, backgrounds, the city… but I’m not sure about doing a full site yet.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」
